.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL =
        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat string assignment in MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH to a single line.
Reformat string assignment in MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to a single line.
Add space after 'if' keyword in conditional statement for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword in null check conditional for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' and '!' operators in directory existence check for style consistency.
Reformat System.out.println call to remove unnecessary line breaks and indentation.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
Remove trailing whitespace at the end of the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Use text blocks for multi-line log message formatting.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import as it is no longer required or provided by the project dependencies.
Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import as it is no longer required or provided by the project dependencies.
Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource provider after LiquibaseProperties.
Replace CorsFilter injection with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The previous CorsFilter injection pattern is replaced by a dedicated filter in the new architecture.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Inject JHipsterProperties to configure security headers dynamically.
Update Content Security Policy configuration to use JHipsterProperties values.
Update frame options to sameOrigin instead of deny.
Add permitAll rules for static assets and Swagger UI in the new authorization DSL.
Add authorization rule for v3 API docs.
Update static resource location paths to reflect a change in the directory structure of static assets.
Refactor resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader globbing instead of specific directory prefixes.
Remove unused import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException as it is no longer needed after API change.
Remove unused import java.util.* as it is no longer needed.
Remove unused import org.springframework.http.MediaType as it is no longer used.
Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic, a feature introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly, removing the try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException which is unnecessary for UTF-8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, reflecting changes in Spring Security 6.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger v2 endpoints from CORS configuration.
Update Swagger resources CORS path to match new Swagger UI structure.
